COMBAT_SPELL_TIMER.Title: Combat Spell Timer
COMBAT_SPELL_TIMER.RemoveOnDeletePrompt: {name} was removed from combat. Also remove their tracked spell timer(s)?
COMBAT_SPELL_TIMER.InitiativeHint: Leave blank to use combatant's rolled initiative

Rage.ExtendPrompt2014: {name}'s Rage turn just ended. Extend or end it?
Rage.ExtendPrompt2024: {name}'s Rage turn just ended. Extend or end it?
Rage.AlreadyRagingPrompt: {name} is already raging! How many rounds remain?

Beyond20.SettingHint: Add a "Cast Spell" button to Beyond20 spell chat cards that casts the spell in Foundry and consumes the slot.
Beyond20.AutoCastHint: Automatically cast Beyond20 spells you trigger instead of clicking the button. The button is still shown, but disabled.
Beyond20.AutoRageHint: Automatically start Rage on Beyond20 Rage cards you trigger instead of clicking the button. The button is still shown, but disabled.
Beyond20.SpellNotFound: Combat Spell Timer: couldn't find the D&D Beyond spell "{name}" on {actor}. Its name on the character sheet may differ.
Beyond20.NoActivity: Combat Spell Timer: "{name}" has no usable activity to cast.
Beyond20.NoActor: Combat Spell Timer: couldn't resolve the casting actor for this card.

SpellMap.Title: Beyond20 Spell Name Mappings
SpellMap.MenuHint: Map D&D Beyond spell names to the matching spell names on your Foundry character sheets, for spells the Cast Spell button can't find by name.
SpellMap.Help: Map a D&D Beyond spell name (left) to the spell's name on the Foundry character sheet (right). Matching ignores case. Leave nothing blank; incomplete rows are discarded on save.
